abstract: The list of other nodes connected to this node.
overview:
## Discussion

In GameplayKit, the connections between nodes in a graph are directional. For example, if the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKGraphNode/connectedNodes] list of Node A contains Node B, then a traveler on the graph can move directly from Node A to Node B. For the reverse to also be true, the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKGraphNode/connectedNodes] list of Node B must contain Node A. To conveniently create connections in both directions, use the `bidirectional` parameter of the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKGraphNode/addConnections(to:bidirectional:)] method.

For more information, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172].

# connectedNodes

**Instance Property**

The list of other nodes connected to this node.

## Declaration

```swift
var connectedNodes: [GKGraphNode] { get }
```

## Discussion

In GameplayKit, the connections between nodes in a graph are directional. For example, if the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKGraphNode/connectedNodes] list of Node A contains Node B, then a traveler on the graph can move directly from Node A to Node B. For the reverse to also be true, the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKGraphNode/connectedNodes] list of Node B must contain Node A. To conveniently create connections in both directions, use the `bidirectional` parameter of the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKGraphNode/addConnections(to:bidirectional:)] method.

For more information, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172].

## Working with Connections

- **addConnections(to:bidirectional:)**: Connects this node to all nodes in the specified list.
- **removeConnections(to:bidirectional:)**: Removes the connections from this node to the specified nodes.
